content.text:
All source is verified. Here is the analysis:

- **`crates/orbit-agent/src/runtime/backend.rs`** — calls `ProviderRegistry::register`, not `ToolRegistry::register`. Excluded.
- **`crates/orbit-engine/src/executor/registry.rs`** — calls `ActivityExecutorRegistry::register`. Excluded.
- **`crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/mod.rs`** — calls sub-module free functions (`fs::register(registry)`, etc.), never `registry.register(…)` itself. Excluded.
- **`crates/orbit-tools/src/registry.rs`** — defines `ToolRegistry::register`; doesn't call it. Excluded.
- All seven builtin sub-module `register` functions and `load_external_tools` in builder.rs directly call `registry.register(…)` on a `&mut ToolRegistry`. Confirmed.

```json
  "answer": [
    "crates/orbit-core/src/runtime/builder.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/fs/mod.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/git/mod.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/github/mod.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/net/mod.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/orbit/mod.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/proc/mod.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/time/mod.rs"
  ],
  "excluded": [
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/registry.rs",
    "crates/orbit-agent/src/runtime/backend.rs",
    "crates/orbit-engine/src/executor/registry.rs",
    "crates/orbit-tools/src/builtin/mod.rs"
  ]
}
```
